summary: Renamed plugins/zcode/skills/design-tech/ to tech-design/ via git mv, updated name field in SKILL.md, updated all /design-tech references in plugins/ to /tech-design, created plugins/zcode/SKILLS.md with tech-design and record-decision placeholder entries, added skill index to CLAUDE.md
